/usr/bin/ar qc libprojectforge_model.a CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/AbstractBaseObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/ModelHelpersExt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/abstract_base_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/address_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/calendar_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/cost2_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/datetime_serialization.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/rest_paths.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/task_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/timesheet_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/timesheet_template_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/projectforge_model.dir/src/user_object.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libprojectforge_model.a
